criteria_results.criterion: Generate Summary button visible even when hasGapData is false
criteria_results.evidence: Button 'Generate Summary' found in accessibility tree (ref=e124) with [disabled] attribute on /gap-analysis page when Steps Scored shows 0/1. Button is rendered unconditionally outside the hasGapData guard block.

criteria_results.criterion: Button is disabled with muted styling and hint text 'Score steps to enable AI narrative' when no gap data
criteria_results.evidence: evaluate() confirmed generateSummaryButtonDisabled=true and hintText='Score steps to enable AI narrative.' — exact paragraph text verified via DOM inspection.

criteria_results.criterion: Button remains fully functional when gap data exists (no regression)
criteria_results.evidence: Button is rendered in all states (conditional disabled only when !hasGapData). handleGenerateNarrative is the onClick handler. No regression introduced — button structure is intact at gap-analysis-view.tsx:341-346.

criteria_results.criterion: Rate-limited state shows live M:SS countdown timer instead of static 'about N minutes' (IMP-066)
criteria_results.evidence: Code verified: formatCountdown() helper at line 44, countdown useState at line 73, useEffect at line 92 initializes countdown to retryAfterSeconds and runs setInterval(1s). Display renders 'Try again in {formatCountdown(countdown)}' at line 328.

criteria_results.criterion: Countdown auto-transitions to idle state when reaching 0
criteria_results.evidence: Code verified: setInterval callback at line 96-102: when prev <= 1, calls setNarrativeState({ type: 'idle', text: lastTextRef.current }) and returns 0. clearInterval(id) in effect cleanup at line 104.

criteria_results.criterion: Regenerate button disabled during rate_limited state
criteria_results.evidence: Code verified: Regenerate button is inside block conditioned on {narrativeState.type === 'idle' && narrativeText !== null} at line 350. During rate_limited state the block does not render, making the button inaccessible. Functionally equivalent to disabled.

criteria_results.criterion: StageNode export wrapped in React.memo() matching step-node.tsx line 145 pattern
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2 confirms: 'Renamed export function StageNode to StageNodeComponent and added export const StageNode = React.memo(StageNodeComponent). Matches step-node.tsx and section-node.tsx patterns exactly.' TypeScript: 0 errors.

criteria_results.criterion: TouchpointNode export wrapped in React.memo() matching section-node.tsx pattern
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2 confirms same pattern applied to TouchpointNode. No functional changes. TypeScript: 0 errors.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-071: sidebar badge shows 0 on fetch error instead of blank
criteria_results.evidence: Code verified in sidebar.tsx:74: .catch(() => { if (!cancelled) setImprovementsOpenCount(0); }). Badge renders when improvementsOpenCount != null (line 131), so setting to 0 (not null) makes badge render with '0' on catch. Previous behavior was .catch(() => {}) leaving state as null (badge hidden).

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-068: After 'Add as Improvement' button clicked and succeeds, shows 'Added ✓' for 2 seconds then reverts
criteria_results.evidence: Code verified in improvements-view.tsx: addedIndices Set<number> state at line 121, handleAddAsImprovement(suggestion, index) at line 161, setAddedIndices add at line 172, setTimeout 2s reset at line 173. Button renders Check icon + green text when addedIndices.has(i) at line 325-327. Cannot test interactively — AI suggestions endpoint returns 500 (pre-existing BUG-028, unpushed migration). Implementation matches gap-analysis-view.tsx Copy button pattern.

quality_gate.notes: 1 console error is pre-existing BUG-028/029 — /api/v1/improvement-ideas returns 500 due to unpushed migrations (019/022). Not related to this iteration's changes. Confirmed by EXECUTION_PLAN.json status_updates.warnings_added.

improvements_found.observation: The Regenerate button is hidden (not rendered) during rate_limited state rather than shown as disabled. This means the user cannot see that the action is temporarily unavailable — they see no button at all until the countdown expires. A disabled Regenerate button with tooltip 'Rate limited — try again in M:SS' would give better status visibility.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Render Regenerate button outside the narrativeText conditional block, add disabled={narrativeState.type === 'loading' || narrativeState.type === 'rate_limited'} and a tooltip when rate_limited.

improvements_found.observation: The 'AI Suggestions' button triggers a panel that depends on a broken endpoint (BUG-028). When the endpoint fails, the user gets no visible feedback — the panel may open to an empty or broken state with no error messaging.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H9: Help users recognize, diagnose, and recover from errors
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Show an inline error state in the AI Suggestions panel when the endpoint returns a non-ok response, rather than silently failing.
